3208290.name: The Flower Inspector
3208290.description:
Welcome to your night shift.

It's time to return that favor. For one night, you must inspect flowers and decide where you'll ship them to. There's a long shift ahead and some of your choices may haunt you.

If you feel you're being watched, turn off the lights and hide.

Inspect Specimens

You can use a variety of tools to inspect flowers that arrive at the office, including a camera with IR/UV lenses and a microscope.

Compare the data you collect with the flower entry at HERBAWiki™ to determine if a flower can be considered anomalous.

Choices and Consequences

You'll find yourself in the middle of a situation with many conflicts of interest. Depending on what you choose, you will make some people unhappy. Decide your route and survive through the consequences.

Dealing with the Unknown

Depending on what foes you make along the way, your reality can certainly be altered. The game may not be the same every time.
3208290.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
